# Siorg

## Overview

gSage AI — SIORG organisational structure tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `siorg` | Query the Brazilian federal government organisational structure (SIORG): org listing, hierarchy with Mermaid diagrams, contacts, positions and occupants. | `gov:siorg:read` | — | — |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

_No configuration-derived environment variables._

## Operations

### `siorg`

- **`get_contato`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `codigo_unidade` | `integer` | — | Numeric unit code (extracted from the SIORG URI). Required for get_orgao, get_estrutura, get_ocupantes, get_contato.  Example: 26 = Presidência da República. |

- **`get_estrutura`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `codigo_unidade` | `integer` | — | Numeric unit code (extracted from the SIORG URI). Required for get_orgao, get_estrutura, get_ocupantes, get_contato.  Example: 26 = Presidência da República. |
  | `max_depth` | `integer` | — | [get_estrutura] Maximum depth levels to return. Default 3. Reduce if the output is too large. |
  | `resolve_depth` | `integer` | — | [get_estrutura] How many levels to resolve names for via parallel API calls. 0 = fast (codes only). Default 2 resolves immediate children. Higher values are slower but give more names. |

- **`get_ocupantes`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `codigo_unidade` | `integer` | — | Numeric unit code (extracted from the SIORG URI). Required for get_orgao, get_estrutura, get_ocupantes, get_contato.  Example: 26 = Presidência da República. |

- **`get_orgao`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `codigo_unidade` | `integer` | — | Numeric unit code (extracted from the SIORG URI). Required for get_orgao, get_estrutura, get_ocupantes, get_contato.  Example: 26 = Presidência da República. |

- **`list_orgaos`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `tipo` | `string` | — | [list_orgaos] Filter by unit type. Common values: 'orgao', 'entidade', 'autarquia', 'fundacao', 'empresa-publica', 'sociedade-economia-mista'. Omit for all types. |

- **`search_orgaos`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `nome` | `string` | — | [search_orgaos] Search term — case-insensitive match against org name and abbreviation. |
